candidates.why: Explicit current portion of long-term debt; fits short-term debt definition and excludes leases.
Current borrowings line appears among current liabilities and likely represents short-term borrowings/current debt, excluding leases because lease liabilities are shown separately.

variables.notes: Selected minimal non-lease current debt components: current Borrowings plus current maturities of long-term debt. Excluded Finance Lease Liability and capital lease maturity rows per rule. No evidence that current Borrowings already includes the maturities line, so both are used.

candidates.why: Exact match for current tax liabilities / taxes payable.
